name: Idea Origin Traceability Rate
description: Measures the percentage of published or staged outputs with complete origin tracking for human-created and AI-assisted components.
goalMapping: Preserves intellectual ownership and auditability across creative and operational workflows.

escalation_policy.on_critical: Suspend release readiness for affected output sets and trigger audit remediation workflow.
escalation_policy.on_warning: Increase sampling depth and assign corrective actions to owning agent.
